name: nocap-extension
description: No Cap – Ethical Coding Assistant Browser Extension

scripts.icons: npm run icons:generate && npm run icons:convert
scripts.build: npm run build:chrome && npm run build:firefox
scripts.package:chrome: npm run build:chrome && cd dist/chrome && npx -y bestzip ../../releases/nocap-chrome.zip .
scripts.package:firefox: npm run build:firefox && cd dist/firefox && npx -y bestzip ../../releases/nocap-firefox.zip .
